// FeatureToggles: Enable or disable each QOL feature. Set a value to true to enable that patch category, or false to disable it.
// EnableAnimations: Speeds up or skips certain animations (recalls, /die) and lets you control /die message timing.
// EnableAugmentations: Adjusts augmentation caps and optionally ignores shared attribute/resist group limits so augs stack independently.
// EnableDefaults: Applies global default property overrides on world open (for example higher MaximumLuminance).
// EnableFellowships: Changes fellowship size, invite behavior (ignore busy), and XP share percentages.
// EnablePermanentObjects: Prevents objects/containers marked FakeBool.Permanent from being wiped by landblock resets.
// EnableRecklessness: Tweaks Recklessness damage bonus scaling across power levels.
// EnableTailoring: Relaxes tailoring requirements to allow more flexible armor clothing swaps while still blocking unsafe cases.
// EnableVendorsBuyEverything: Makes vendors accept all sellable item types (subject to vanilla IsSellable/Retained checks).
// EnableQuestgiverAuras: Adds visible auras to NPCs that stamp or inquire quests using an Aegis WCID you choose.
// EnableStackable: Makes additional item categories stackable (books, keys, generics, lockpicks, scrolls) using the settings below.
// MaxSpecCredits: Total specialisation credits a player may spend. Vanilla cap is 70. Set to 9999 to make it effectively unlimited.

Fellowship.// FlatSharePercent: XP share fraction applied to all members when OverrideSharePercent is true. 1.0 = 100%, 0.5 = 50%.
Fellowship.// SharePercent: Per-member-count XP share table used when OverrideSharePercent is false. Keys are fellowship sizes, values are fractions (0.0–1.0).
Fellowship.// DefaultShare: XP share fraction for fellowships larger than the highest key in SharePercent. 0.0 = no share beyond the table.

Recklessness.// PowerLow: Attack power fraction below which Recklessness provides no bonus. Range 0.0–1.0.
Recklessness.// PowerHigh: Attack power fraction at which Recklessness reaches full effectiveness. Range 0.0–1.0.
Recklessness.// RatingTrained: Damage rating bonus granted when Recklessness is Trained.
Recklessness.// RatingSpecialized: Damage rating bonus granted when Recklessness is Specialized.

QuestgiverAuras.// AegisWcid: WCID of the Aegis item equipped to quest-giver NPCs. Sanguinary Aegis options: 23356=Blue, 23357=Green, 23358=Pink, 23359=Red, 23360=White. Golden Flame: 35982.
QuestgiverAuras.// DebugLogging: When true, logs a WARN line each time an aura Aegis is created and equipped to a quest-giver NPC. Intended for debugging only.

Stackable.// StackableTypes: Per-type toggles for extra stackable item categories. Set a value to true to make that WeenieType stackable, or false to leave it unmodified.
